summary: While **E**xternally **O**wned **A**ccounts can validate signed messages with `ecrecover()` and smart contracts can validate signatures using specifications outlined in [ERC-1271](./eip-1271.md), currently there is no standard method to create or validate signatures made by NFTs. We propose a standard way for anyone to validate whether a signature made by an NFT is valid. This is possible via a modified signature validation function originally found in [ERC-1271](./eip-1271.md): `isValidSignature(tokenId, hash, data)`.
title: Signature Validation Method for NFTs
